title: Rename device - only one earbud is connected, rename is not possible
scenario: Device rename option is unavailable in Device Settings > General when only one earbud is connected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Attempt to rename the device by tapping on the device name field.
5. Observe if the rename option is available or if the field is editable.
expected: The user should be able to rename the device from Device Settings > General regardless of whether one or both earbuds are connected.
